description: The Rig component is used to inform what bones are "Rig" bones for components like Dynamic Bone Chains.

fields.Bones: The bones that are a part of the item this component is on.

methods.CleanupBoneColliders: Called when the cleanup bone colliders button is touched.
methods.GenerateDebugVisual: Called when the generate debug visuals button is touched.
methods.ClearDebugVisual: Called when the clear debug visuals button is touched.
